//: Scope config for this repo's installed acceptance/test-repo-standard.mjs — we live under the exact standard the plugin installs everywhere else.
//docs: The hub-and-spoke docs pages are governed too: voice ban, TODO sweep, placeholder sweep, shadow check — no ungoverned prose ships.
//counts: The README states the standing-test and lint-check counts; the lint derives each truth from the tree so the claims can never go stale. Scoped to the README on purpose: the CHANGELOG's mentions sit inside dated release blocks — history, not live claims — and must not fail forever once the numbers grow.
